info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: Sni punAti punIte stAm pavane pavate NitaH ' (Slo. 27) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'parApUtaM rakzaH parApUtA arAtayaH' (vA॰saM॰1.16) parApUtam=dUrIkftam pUY iti viSezaM vihAya sAmAnye DAtvarTe karaRe pravfttaH parASabdaSca pfTagBAve
'dakziRAprAcI tizWantI patnyavahanti parApAvamavivekam' (Apa॰SrO॰1.3.7.5) parApAvaM SUrpeRa tuzaprohaRaM kftvA
'aTApi nizpunAti' (Sa0 brA0 11421) avaDUnotItyarTaH
'parApUtamiti nizpunAti' (kA0 SrO0 2418) SUrpacAlanotTena vAyunA tuzAn pfTak kftvA'DaH pAtayatItyarTaH

'prAyaScittAni cIrRAni nArAyaRaparANmuKam na nizpunanti rAjendra surAkumBamivApagAH' (BA0 pu0 6118).. iha punantItyetAvatA'lam nArTo nirA AcArahInaM na punanti vedA yadyapyaDItAH saha zaqBiraNgEH (vAsizWe DarmasUtre)
'punantu mAM devajanAH punantu vasavo DiyaH' (f0 96727) ityAdO vEdike vANmaye SoDane'rTe SudDaH punAtiH prayukto dfSyate
'lokepi taTA--punAti paNktiM vaMSyAMSca' (manu0 1105)
'hfdgABiH pUyate vipraH' (manu0 262)
'tajjaH punAtyuBayataH puruzAnekaviMSatim' (yAjYa0 158)
'pApmaByaSca punAtu varDayatu ca SreyAMsi seyaM kaTA' (uttara0 720) ityatra yaTA niruktayorfzikftyoH SatapaTaSrOtasUtrayostu niro'rTavattA na SakyA'pahnotum
'devAnAM muKamagne tvaM satyena vipunIhi mAm' (BA0 saBA0 3146) vipunIhi viSezeRa punIhi
'anftaM hi matto vadati pApmA enaM vipunAti' (pA0 8135 sUtraBAzye)
'paviH Salyo Bavati yadvipunAti kAyam' (ni0 12301) vipunAti vidArayatIti durgaH
'pavO raTanemirBavati yat vipunAti BUmim' (ni0 551) vipunAti Garzati avadArayati Kanati
'indrasyendo jaWaramApavasva' (f0 97010) SrApavasva prakzaran praviSetyarTaH
'te naH sahasriRaM rayiM pavantAmA suvIryam' (f0 9135) asmAnprati pravAhayantvityarTaH
'A pavasva hiraRyavadaSvavat soma vIravat' (vA0 saM0 863) Apavasva prakzara
'savitustvA prasava utpunAmi' (vA0 saM0 131) utpunAmi SoDayAmi nArTa udA
'saviturvaH prasava ut punAmyacCidreRa pavitreRa sUryasya raSmiBiH' (vA0 saM0 112) utpunAmi avadAyAmi
'trirAjyamutpunAti' (drA0 gf0 1214)
'sarpiranutpUtam navanItaM notpUtam' (ASva0 gf0 26)
'(Ajyam) utpUya' (Sa0 brA0 12447) pavitreRa saMSoDyetyarTaH
'dravARAM cEva sarvezAM SudDirutpavanaM smftam' (manu0 5115)
'ete vA utpavitAro yatsUryasya raSmayaH' (Sa0 brA0 1136) utpavitAraH pavanaSIlAH pUtikarAH
'yato'yaM pavate yadaBipavate' (tE0 brA0 2391) aBipavate'Bilakzya vAti
'yadaBipavate yadaBisaMpavate' (tE0 brA0 2391) aBisampavate aBilakzya samyak pavate vAti
'tuByAyaM somaH paripUto adriBiH' (f0 11352) paripUtaH sutarAM pUtaH
